_meta.description: D6 fixtures for google-adk /demos/threadid-frontend-tool-roundtrip (ENT-658, langgraph-python parity). First turn emits a frontend tool call (testFrontendToolCalling); the follow-up turn confirms the tool result without changing threads. Cribbed from aimock/d6/langgraph-python/threadid-frontend-tool-roundtrip.json with context:"google-adk" added to every match. The toolCallId-keyed fixture is ordered first so it catches the second-leg request (after the frontend tool result, where the toolCallId is preserved through the HttpAgent proxy — same disambiguation scheme proven by frontend-tools.json). The bare userMessage fixture only matches the first-leg request that emits the tool call.
